name: Project Zomboid Dedicated Server
description: The Indie Stone Project Zomboid isometric hardcore zombie survival sandbox. Fully supports automated Steam Workshop mod ID downloads, custom map spawning allocations, and SQL character storage.
install_script: echo "Downloading Project Zomboid dedicated binaries (App ID 380870)..." && mkdir -p Zomboid/Server && echo "Done."

config_files.template:
MaxPlayers={{MAX_PLAYERS}}
PVP=true
PauseEmpty=true
GlobalChat=true
LogLocalChat=false
Open=true
